  Sepolia (dry run):   forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url $SEPOLIA_RPC_URL -vvvv   Sepolia (broadcast):   forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url $SEPOLIA_RPC_URL --broadcast --verify -vvvv   Base mainnet (broadcast + verify):   forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url $BASE_RPC_URL --broadcast --verify -vvvv   Required env vars:     DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY   - owner wallet private key (hardware wallet recommended for mainnet)     RECOVERY_ADDRESS       - cold storage address (never the same as deployer)     OPERATOR_ADDRESS       - hot wallet address for FastAPI backend     OPERATOR_BACKUP        - backup operator wallet address     SEPOLIA_RPC_URL        - Infura/Alchemy Sepolia endpoint     BASE_RPC_URL           - Infura/Alchemy Base mainnet endpoint
